TRANSLATIONS.title: MediMitra: Health Assistant
TRANSLATIONS.groq_fail: Sorry, I encountered an error trying to connect to the AI model.
TRANSLATIONS.stt_fail: Could not understand audio. Please try again.
TRANSLATIONS.tts_fail: Could not generate audio for this response.
TRANSLATIONS.emergency_info: In case of a medical emergency, please call 102 (Ambulance) or 108 (Emergency Services).

responses: Hello! I'm MediMitra, your health assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! How can I assist you with your health questions?
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help with?
Happy to help! Let me know if you have more questions.
